name: Incoming Notes to AI Infrastructure Draft - Pending Review
notes: Draft architecture for Google Drive -> n8n -> Claude -> GitHub draft branch -> Cloudflare Pages preview. Do not activate until Claude, GitHub and Cloudflare credentials are configured and manually reviewed.

steps.name: New file detected
steps.description: Watch the Google Drive folder named Incoming Notes.

steps.name: Read file
steps.description: Download file text or export Google Docs content.

steps.name: Privacy redaction
steps.description: Remove or anonymize protected names, contacts, project identifiers and seals before AI processing.

steps.name: Claude summarizes and classifies
steps.description: Generate summary, classification, website article draft, SEO title, meta description, tags and category.

steps.name: Save generated draft
steps.description: Write Markdown to content/drafts/ or content/pending-review/ only.

steps.name: Commit to draft branch
steps.description: Commit with a clear message to a draft branch. No direct main branch publishing.

steps.name: Prepare Cloudflare Pages preview
steps.description: Create or check preview deployment only after draft branch push.
